info.title: Qorstack Report API
info.description: API for generating PDF reports from Word templates

post.description: Upload a font (.ttf, .otf, .woff, .woff2). If the same file already exists (by hash), the existing font is returned without re-uploading.

get.description: Returns all active fonts available to every project.

delete.description: Permanently removes the font from the database, MinIO storage, and Gotenberg cache.

post.summary: Render Word/PDF from stored template (returns link)
post.description: Render a PDF or DOCX using a stored template. Supports variable replacement, tables, images, QR codes, and barcodes. Returns download link.

post.summary: Render PDF from template using sandbox payload (returns link)
post.description: Render a PDF using a stored template with its configured sandbox payload. Returns download link.

post.summary: Render Excel from stored template (returns link)
post.description: Render an Excel file using a stored .xlsx template. Supports variable replacement, tables, images, QR codes, and barcodes. Can output as .xlsx or convert to PDF. Returns download link.

get.description: Get a list of render jobs with pagination and filtering options.
Get details of a specific render job by its ID.

post.description: Create a new report generation job with hybrid quota charging (subscription first, then credit fallback).

get.description: Retrieve report jobs for the authenticated user.

post.description: Upload a template file (DOCX or XLSX). Name is required via query parameter, file is required via multipart form data.

put.summary: Switch active version of a template
put.description: Switch the active version of a template to a specified version number.

get.summary: Generate a new unique template key
get.description: Generates a unique template key for the current user.

ApiKey.description: API Key authentication. Enter your API key in the format: rdx_xxxxx
ApiKey.name: X-API-Key
